stockMarket.summary: Global markets are under pressure on April 2, 2026, as geopolitical tensions with Iran heighten volatility. US futures declined following recent rhetoric, while commodity markets react sharply to potential supply disruptions.
notableMoves: Oil prices: WTI and Brent crude surged over 6% due to supply disruption fears.
Precious metals: Gold fell nearly 3% to ~$4,630; silver dropped over 5.5% as rate hike expectations rise.
Market sentiment: US500 index declined 1.02%. Travel, mining, and tech sectors show mixed performance; Nike dropped over 15%.

exhibitions: Matisse's Jazz: Rhythms in Color (Art Institute of Chicago, through June 1)
More is More is More: A Melody of Maximalism (Art Center Waco, through Apr 25)
Gabriel Orozco Garden: The Three Friends of Winter (Leeum Museum of Art, Seoul)
